overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful historic city of Beauclair in the Toussaint region. The character traverses narrow cobblestone streets, passes under a monumental stone archway, and emerges into a sunlit coastal plaza with a fountain overlooking the sea and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone street with merchant cart

events.description: character turns left to ascend the sloping cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow street passing by a barrel cart and NPC pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress standing near the stone staircase
woman in yellow dress walking up the slope ahead

entered.detail: wooden cart loaded with oak barrels parked on the right side
curved stone staircase with decorative balustrade ascending the building
tall medieval buildings with balconies and shuttered windows lining the street
red and orange pennant banners strung across the street overhead
large decorative stone archway visible in the distance at the top of the slope

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cobblestone street lined with tall historic buildings. A wooden barrel cart sits on the right while colorful banners hang overhead. Geralt walks forward past NPCs standing near a curved stone staircase on the left, then turns to ascend the sloping street toward a distant archway.

agents.ego_description: walking up the sloping cobblestone street toward the stone archway

notable_agents.action: woman with parasol standing by the staircase wall watching the street

entered.detail: ornate orange building with red shutters and stone balconies
tall building with pointed red roof and Gothic architectural details

segments.scene_description: Geralt ascends the sloping street toward the stone archway. The orange historic mansion with red shutters dominates the right side while a Gothic tower appears on the left. The barrel cart falls behind as the character approaches the monumental archway ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street passing through monumental archway

events.description: passes through the large stone archway into the next district

agents.ego_description: walking through the archway following a child running ahead toward the plaza

notable_agents.action: child in blue dress running ahead toward the open plaza

entered.detail: glimpse of bright blue sea visible between the buildings ahead

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through the monumental stone archway, transitioning to a new district. The street continues with historic buildings on both sides while a child runs ahead toward the opening. A glimpse of the blue sea becomes visible in the distance on the right as the archway recedes behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza approaching coastal terrace with fountain

events.description: street opens into wide sunlit plaza with view of the sea and mountains
fountain and coastal panorama become fully visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through the plaza toward the fountain overlooking the sea

notable_agents.action: woman in red dress walking in the same direction toward the terrace

entered.detail: white stone tiered fountain with water basin in the plaza center
bright blue sea visible beyond the terrace railing
hazy mountains rising across the water on the horizon
colorful historic buildings with arched doorways lining the plaza

segments.scene_description: The street opens dramatically into a wide sunlit plaza. The octagonal fountain comes into view in the center while the blue sea and distant mountains reveal themselves beyond the terrace. Geralt walks toward the fountain passing other pedestrians, with colorful historic buildings lining the left side of the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal terrace plaza with central fountain

events.description: character turns right toward the fountain and terrace edge overlooking the sea

agents.ego_description: turning toward the fountain and walking along its edge toward the terrace

notable_agents.action: armored guard standing near the stone terrace railing overlooking the sea

entered.detail: stone balustrade railing along the edge of the terrace overlooking the water
large stone planters with vibrant red flowers along the building wall

segments.scene_description: Geralt turns right toward the fountain, walking along the cobblestone edge of the plaza. The stone terrace railing comes into view on the right overlooking the sea, while potted red flowers line the left side. An armored guard stands near the railing as the character approaches the fountain structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: fountain pool with building arcade entrance

events.description: character steps into the shallow fountain pool and wades through the water

agents.ego_description: walking through the shallow fountain water toward the building arcade entrance

entered.detail: covered walkway entrance with stone arches and columns ahead
green lily pads floating on the surface of the fountain pool

segments.scene_description: Geralt steps into the shallow fountain pool, wading through the water toward the building arcade entrance ahead. Water lilies float on the surface around the character's legs. The sea view shifts to the left as the character moves through the pool, approaching the shaded arcade with its stone columns.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a narrow historic street that gradually opens into a sunlit coastal plaza. It begins in a cobblestone alley lined with tall buildings and colorful banners, moving past a wooden barrel cart and NPCs as the path slopes upward. As the camera ascends, the scene shifts past an orange mansion and a Gothic tower before passing through a monumental stone archway that reveals a glimpse of the blue sea. The environment then expands dramatically into a wide plaza featuring an octagonal fountain and a terrace overlooking distant mountains, with the camera turning right past potted red flowers and an armored guard. Finally, the movement leads Geralt into the shallow waters of the fountain pool, wading through floating water lilies toward a shaded stone arcade.
